# Maison

> Artisan home goods, lighting, and lifestyle pieces for considered living.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Featured collections and editorial highlights.
- [Shop](/products): Browse all products and collections.
- [About](/about): Our story and craft philosophy.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the studio.

## Optional

- [Cart](/cart): Shopping bag.
- [Account](/account): Customer account and orders.
